value.title: Problem #6 · Chat request failures (gateway impact)
value.description: Chat turns are failing — usually downstream impact of an ai-gateway degradation (retry storm / upstream errors). Davis should root-cause this to ai-gateway.

input.value: fetch spans | filter span.name == "chat.turn" | makeTimeseries total = count(), errors = countIf(span.status_code == "error"), interval:1m | fieldsAdd error_rate_pct = (errors[] / total[]) * 100 | fieldsRemove total, errors

properties.value: Chat turns are failing — usually downstream impact of an ai-gateway degradation (retry storm / upstream errors). Davis should root-cause this to ai-gateway.
